mapper.insert: INSERT INTO conversation (user_id, title, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM conversation WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM conversation WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY update_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE conversation SET title = #{title}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE conversation SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE conversation SET update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM conversation WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY update_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM conversation WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
